caption: A person prepares food in a kitchen setting, as seen through a video clip. A large metal mixing bowl holds a mixture of pale, grain-like food and small white pieces. In the top-left frame, the person's hand pours more of the food mixture into the bowl. In the following frames, the hand moves to stir and mix the ingredients. A white plate with more food and a small red bowl containing white pieces sit on a wooden surface behind the mixing bowl. A circular inset in the bottom-left of each frame shows a woman with short blonde hair wearing a black top. Each frame features a logo in the top-left corner with the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" set against a background of blue sky and clouds. The scene progresses from pouring ingredients to mixing them by hand.
